properties.description: One of the approved non-standard file formats: 'Spectral Data Exchange File (.emsa)'-->text/plain; '3D model file (.obj)'-->model/obj; 'Standard Triangle Language (.stl)'-->model/stl; 'Open XML workbook (.xlsx)'-->application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet; 'Neptune Plus export (.exp)'-->application/octet-stream
Free text explanation of file format, or a link to a publicly accessible specification for the format.
